_comment: AgriTrade chaincode endorsement policies — Fabric v2.5 lifecycle

trade._description: 2-of-3 orgs must endorse trade transactions (listing creation, order placement)

escrow._description: Buyer + Farmer must both endorse escrow operations (hold/release/refund)

supplychain._description: Any 2 of the 3 orgs must endorse supply-chain events

logistics._description: Logistics + one of Farmer/Buyer must endorse shipment updates

privateData._description: Private data collections for sensitive pricing data (not on-chain)
